title: arctotis microcephala
intro: Arctotis microcephala, also known as the small-headed arctotis or small-headed African daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctotis microcephala include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating various skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used in topical applications to promote healing and skin regeneration.
